source_pr.title: tests: add sorted result for a test
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #47411

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

The test result is unstable. This PR adds the annotation `--sorted_result` to the line.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No need to test
  > - [x] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

symptoms: The test result is unstable. This PR adds the annotation `--sorted_result` to the line.
failure_signature: The test result is unstable. This PR adds the annotation `--sorted_result` to the line.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: The test result is unstable.
fix_pattern: The test result is unstable. This PR adds the annotation `--sorted_result` to the line.

evidence: evidence: The test result is unstable. This PR adds the annotation `--sorted_result` to the line.
